examples: The offer was too enticing to refuse.
A prospective premium of about 30 percent on their initial investment is enticing.
How the word made the leap from "someone who makes you want to cuddle" to "someone who makes you cringe" isn't really known but there are a few enticing clues.
Heinz (HNZ), the No. 1 ketchup maker, is an enticing stock in the food industry.
The higher the fee to the search firm makes the candidate even more enticing.
